file_system_logic.directory: Authoritative source for publishable content. Hierarchy managed via mkdocs.yml.
Volatile storage for logs, temporary analysis, and unverified code samples. Constraint: Must be excluded from version control (Git ignored).
Generated artifacts. Constraint: Do not edit directly; managed by MkDocs build process.

data_logic.persistence_layer: Background status is persisted via .state.json, PLAN.md, and background-task-log.md in agent-output/.

technical_constraints.markdown_standards: Require blank lines around block elements (lists, code blocks, blockquotes). Fenced code blocks are mandatory over indented blocks.
technical_constraints.git_workflow: Staging is permitted (git add); committing is restricted to explicit user command.
